description_long: This lamp features a robust, octagonal metal base and top, connected by a central cylindrical column. Four angled arms radiate from the center, each holding a cylindrical light fixture, arranged symmetrically around a spherical hub. Two concentric metallic rings encircle the central structure, adding both support and a decorative, industrial flair. Several thick, black cables spiral around the lamp, connecting the top and bottom, and contributing to its mechanical, utilitarian appearance. The surfaces are finished in a weathered blue-gray metal with bronze accents, giving the lamp a rugged, urban aesthetic. The overall design suggests a heavy-duty, possibly industrial or sci-fi inspired floor lamp suitable for outdoor or public urban environments.
description: A rugged, industrial-style floor lamp with a blue-gray metal base, four angled light arms, and spiraling black cables. Decorative metallic rings and bronze accents enhance its urban, mechanical look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical arrangement of four angled light arms, the central spherical hub, and the prominent spiraling cables.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the lamp, the spiral of the cables, and the alignment of the metallic rings around the central column.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the four light arms and the cables, but with less visibility of the central hub details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the vertical structure, the cable arrangement, and the geometric base and top.
